mistral.hm_gantry_105: The following wings are receiving bonuses:
mistral.hm_noBays: This ship does not have standard fighter bays.
mistral.hm_priorityLink_bullet2_single: %s Automatically targets the highest DP frigate within %s.
mistral.hm_priorityLink_bullet2_dual: %s Automatically targets the highest 2 DP frigates within %s.
mistral.hm_priorityLink_bullet3: %s This ship's Raven fighters are treated as 6DP.
mistral.hm_priorityLink_bullet4: %s Targetting a fighter or frigate will overwrite automatic targetting.
mistral.hm_priorityLink_bullet5: %s Boosts target's timeflow by %s for 10 seconds
mistral.hm_priorityLink_bullet6: %s Reduces target's damage taken by %s for 10 seconds
mistral.eis_RAFText1b: Increases damage of energy weapons by %s
mistral.eis_RAFText1: Increases rate of fire of ballistic weapons by %s
mistral.eis_RAFText2: Decreases flux generation of ballistic weapons by %s
mistral.eis_RAFText3: Increases reload speed of ballistic weapons by %s
mistral.eis_lungeText1: Brief, massive boost to speed and acceleration, allowing the ship to lunge in any direction
mistral.eis_lungeText3: Built-in AI assist activates for %s second, allowing the ship to dodge through other ships and weapon fire
mistral.eis_lungeText4: Maneuverability boosted by %s for %s second after lunge ends
mistral.eis_parryText2: Increases shield efficiency by %s for %s seconds
mistral.eis_parryText4: System Regeneration Bonus are %s less effective
mistral.eis_zandatsuText1: Does not benefit from additional cargo bonus, but improves %s with ballistic reload speed
mistral.eis_aquilaText1: Increases max speed by %s/%s or %s, whichever is lower
mistral.eis_aquilaText2: Increases flux dissipation rate while venting by %s
mistral.eis_aquilaText3: Allows zero-flux engine boost up to %s flux
mistral.eis_aquilaText4d: Reduce autofire range of missile weapons to %s
mistral.eis_aquilaText4c: Decrease engagement range of all wings by %s
mistral.eis_aquilaText5: Prevents weapon range from exceeding base range.
mistral.eis_aquilaText5a: Prevents weapon range from exceeding base range. Affects modules.
mistral.eis_aquilaText5b: A skill or hullmod is attempting to increase the ship's bonus weapon range. This will be blocked.
mistral.eis_aquilaText6: Can not be normally installed on civilian ships, frigates, or destroyers.
